tasks.title: Extract all CSS custom properties from Nextcloud theming
tasks.description: Audit Nextcloud's DefaultTheme.php, CommonThemeTrait.php, and core SCSS files to extract a complete categorized list of CSS custom properties
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Nextcloud's DefaultTheme.php, CommonThemeTrait.php, and core SCSS files WHEN all CSS custom properties are extracted THEN a complete categorized list is documented in mappings.md

tasks.title: Create defaults.css with all --nldesign-* token defaults
tasks.description: Create a defaults.css file with sensible Rijkshuisstijl-based defaults for all --nldesign-* tokens including brand, status, background, text, border, link, button, component, animation, and spacing tokens
acceptance_criteria: WHEN defaults.css is loaded THEN every --nldesign-* token has a sensible Rijkshuisstijl-based default value
Component token defaults reference brand tokens

tasks.title: Create generate-tokens.mjs script
tasks.description: Build a Node.js script that reads JSON token files from nl-design-system/themes and generates CSS token files with --nldesign-* prefixed variables
acceptance_criteria: WHEN node scripts/generate-tokens.mjs /path/to/themes is executed THEN CSS files are generated in css/tokens/ for every organization
Each CSS file contains :root declarations with --nldesign-* prefixed variables
Malformed JSON files are logged as warnings without stopping the script

tasks.title: Create token-sets.json manifest generation
tasks.description: Extend the generation script to produce a token-sets.json manifest mapping organization IDs to display names and descriptions
acceptance_criteria: WHEN generation finishes THEN token-sets.json contains an entry for every organization with id, name, and description
Manually added metadata is preserved on subsequent runs

tasks.title: Run generation script to produce all 48+ token CSS files
tasks.description: Execute the generation script against the current nl-design-system/themes repo to produce all token CSS files
acceptance_criteria: 48+ CSS files exist in css/tokens/
Existing token sets produce visually equivalent output to current manual files

tasks.title: Create utrecht-bridge.css
tasks.description: Create a temporary bridge file that maps --utrecht-* component tokens to --nldesign-component-* equivalents
acceptance_criteria: All --utrecht-* tokens are mapped to --nldesign-component-* equivalents
File header states this is temporary
Tokens fall back to defaults.css values when no --utrecht-* value is defined

tasks.title: Rewrite overrides.css with all Nextcloud variables
tasks.description: Rewrite overrides.css to contain ALL Nextcloud CSS variables, each mapped to --nldesign-* or commented out with explanation
acceptance_criteria: Every Nextcloud CSS variable is present — mapped or commented
Variables organized by category
Intentionally unoverridden variables include comments

tasks.title: Update theme.css with new token mappings
tasks.description: Add mappings for new --nldesign-* tokens (animations, spacing, placeholders) and component tokens to theme.css
acceptance_criteria: New tokens mapped to corresponding Nextcloud CSS variables
Component tokens mapped to Nextcloud element styling

tasks.title: Create TokenSetService for filesystem-based token discovery
tasks.description: Create a PHP service that discovers available token sets by scanning css/tokens/ and reading token-sets.json
acceptance_criteria: getAvailableTokenSets() returns all token sets with id, name, description
Validation checks filesystem, not hardcoded array

tasks.title: Update SettingsController for dynamic token validation
tasks.description: Remove hardcoded $validSets array and use TokenSetService for validation, add getAvailableTokenSets endpoint
acceptance_criteria: Uses TokenSetService to check filesystem
New getAvailableTokenSets() endpoint returns all available sets

tasks.title: Update Admin settings and Application bootstrap
tasks.description: Update Admin.php to use TokenSetService for dynamic dropdown, update Application.php CSS load order
acceptance_criteria: Dropdown lists all organizations from TokenSetService
CSS loads in correct order: fonts → defaults → tokens/{org} → utrecht-bridge → theme → overrides

tasks.title: Create sync-tokens.yml workflow
tasks.description: Create GitHub Actions workflow with nightly cron schedule that syncs tokens from upstream
acceptance_criteria: Nightly cron at 3 AM UTC and workflow_dispatch trigger
Clones themes repo, runs generate-tokens.mjs, creates PR if changes detected

tasks.title: Add change detection and PR update logic
tasks.description: Ensure the workflow updates existing PRs instead of creating duplicates
acceptance_criteria: Existing open PR is updated rather than duplicated

tasks.title: Create mappings.md documentation table
tasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation table mapping every Nextcloud variable to its NL Design equivalent
acceptance_criteria: Table with columns: Nextcloud Variable, NL Design Mapping, Category, Notes
Every Nextcloud variable listed

tasks.title: Update README with sources section
tasks.description: Add sources, sync workflow docs, and contribution guide to README
acceptance_criteria: Links to themes repo, handbook, participation guide
Nightly sync workflow explanation
Instructions for adding a new token set

tasks.title: Verification tests (9.1-9.4)
tasks.description: Visual regression, incomplete token set, dynamic dropdown, and end-to-end workflow tests
acceptance_criteria: Existing 5 token sets produce visually equivalent output
Incomplete token sets fall back correctly
48+ organizations appear in admin dropdown
Full CSS load order renders correctly
